creator: gudfitz@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 181375
full output of `freebsd-update fetch`

When running `freebsd-update fetch` on 11.0-RELEASE-p8, the following notice is erroneously displayed:

WARNING: FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p8 is approaching its End-of-Life date.
It is strongly recommended that you upgrade to a newer
release within the next 2 months.
